name: ExtensionCoverageEligibilityResponse_Error_Expression
title: R5: FHIRPath of element(s) related to issue (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` 0..* `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` 0..* `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` has a context of CoverageEligibilityResponse.error based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CoverageEligibilityResponse`.
Element `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: FHIRPath of element(s) related to issue (new)
element.comment:
Element `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` has a context of CoverageEligibilityResponse.error based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `CoverageEligibilityResponse`.
Element `CoverageEligibilityResponse.error.expression` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The root of the FHIRPath is the resource or bundle that generated OperationOutcome.  Each FHIRPath SHALL resolve to a single node.

element.short: FHIRPath of element(s) related to issue
element.definition: A [simple subset of FHIRPath](https://hl7.org/fhir/fhirpat.html#simple) limited to element names, repetition indicators and the default child accessor that identifies one of the elements in the resource that caused this issue to be raised.
element.comment: The root of the FHIRPath is the resource or bundle that generated OperationOutcome.  Each FHIRPath SHALL resolve to a single node.
